subcodes.first_line: O radiant joy! Praise be unto God that the lamp hath been set aflame and the pathway hath become clear and manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الابتهاج الوهاج الحمد لله سراج افروخته و منهاج واضح و مشهود گشته نسیم
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @praise and encouragement, @unity; oneness of humanity, @Christ; Christianity
